push 100 i              # line 0:  initialize outer counter
duplicate               # line 1:  OUTER LOOP START — copy i for printing
out_number              # line 2:  print i
push 10                 # line 3:
out_char                # line 4:  newline
push -200 j             # line 5:  initialize inner counter
duplicate               # line 6:  INNER LOOP START — copy j for printing
out_number              # line 7:  print j
push 10                 # line 8:
out_char                # line 9:  newline
push 3                  # line 10:
add j                   # line 11: j = j + 3
duplicate               # line 12: copy j for comparison
push 50                 # line 13:
greater                 # line 14: 1 if j > 50 (stop condition)
not                     # line 15: 1 if j <= 50 (continue condition)
branch 6                # line 16: jump to inner loop start if j <= 50
pop                     # line 17: discard j_final
push 5                  # line 18:
subtract i              # line 19: i = i - 5
duplicate               # line 20: copy i for comparison
push -101               # line 21:
greater                 # line 22: 1 if i > -101 (i.e. i >= -100, continue)
branch 1                # line 23: jump to outer loop start if still in range
